summary: Iteration 152: Strict Tenant Mode + Wire Failure Tracking + Ruff Wave 2 + Orphan Guard - All 11 tests passed. Technical debt sprint features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: STRICT_TENANT_MODE=true is correctly enabled in backend/.env
SchemaOnlyCollection class in tenant_db.py allows index creation but blocks data operations without tenant context
Workers (outbox_worker, import_retry_worker, ari_push_worker) correctly use get_system_db() and tenant_context()
Auth router uses get_system_db() for system-level auth operations
Wire status API (/api/wire-status) provides unified failure visibility across import bridge, outbox, and ARI push
Ruff config in pyproject.toml includes I (isort) and F401 (unused imports) rules
CI/CD workflow includes orphan-file and import-boundary guards as hard gates
No TenantViolationError in logs after fresh backend restart
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 152 verified technical debt sprint features. Key endpoints tested: GET /health (200), POST /api/auth/login (200), GET /api/pms/rooms (200, 96 rooms), GET /api/wire-status (200, returns overall_health, subsystems, pipeline_counts), GET /api/wire-status/failures (200, returns items array). Ruff check passes with zero violations. Orphan file guard passes (19 root files in allow-list). Import boundary guard passes (3 known exceptions tracked). STRICT_TENANT_MODE=true is active and working correctly.

POST /api/auth/login.notes: Returns access_token, token_type=bearer, user object with role=super_admin

GET /api/wire-status.notes: Returns overall_health=healthy, subsystems (reservation_import, outbox_dispatch, ari_outbound_push), pipeline_counts

no_tenant_violation_errors.notes: No TenantViolationError in logs after fresh restart

ruff_check.notes: All checks passed with zero violations

import_boundary_guard.notes: No new import boundary violations (3 known exceptions tracked)

test_classes: TestHealthCheck (1 test) - Health endpoint returns healthy
TestAuthLogin (2 tests) - Login success and invalid credentials
TestWireStatusAPI (2 tests) - Wire status and failures endpoints
TestStrictTenantMode (2 tests) - Env check and no violation errors
TestOrphanFileGuard (1 test) - Orphan file guard passes
TestImportBoundaryGuard (1 test) - Import boundary guard passes

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are backed by real MongoDB queries and actual CI guard scripts.
